mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS auction_id, ai.id AS item_id, ai.brand, ai.name, a.status, a.type, a.inspection_yn, a.start_price, a.buy_now_price, a.vickrey_price, a.bid_count, a.wish_count, a.end_date, ii.url AS representative_image_url, a.created_at FROM auction a INNER JOIN wishlist w ON a.id = w.auction_id INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id LEFT JOIN item_image ii ON ii.item_id = ai.id AND ii.display_order = ( SELECT MIN(ii2.display_order) FROM item_image ii2 WHERE ii2.item_id = ai.id ) WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY
COALESCE(a.vickrey_price, a.start_price) ${order}, a.created_at DESC (a.bid_count + a.wish_count) ${order}, a.created_at DESC a.wish_count ${order}, a.created_at DESC a.end_date ${order}, a.created_at DESC a.created_at ${order}
